legacyAnchorReference.purpose: Legacy/reference Anchor deployment only. Must not be used as hackathon demo target after Quasar cutover.

knownGaps: Full demo-agent A→B→C escrow/settlement flow must be ported from legacy Anchor script to Quasar-native program IDs/instruction layouts or replaced with an equivalent Quasar-native demo path.
MagicBlock PER/TEE final-demo claim must be validated against the Quasar-native escrow/settlement path, or removed from final on-chain claims instead of treated as future work.
All operator/judge surfaces must show Quasar multi-program IDs and must not use legacy Anchor registration/escrow state as primary demo state.

evidence.result: executable=true; owner=BPFLoaderUpgradeab1e11111111111111111111111; no signing or wallet mutation

knownLimitations: Quasar Registry devnet mutations are complete for demo agents A/B/C.
Legacy Anchor artifacts may remain only as historical comparison; they are not acceptable final-demo proof.

submissionReadyReason: Blocked by critical success factor: final Colosseum demo is not done until every demo-critical on-chain path is Quasar-native. Registry A/B/C is live on Quasar, but the full A→B→C escrow/settlement/MagicBlock PER path is not yet ported/validated as Quasar-native.
